steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: To explain how Fulton, Missouri, got its name, the answer must name the city's namesake and show why that person is notable. The notes identify both: Robert Fulton and his significance as the designer of the first commercially successful steamboat.

steps.title: Evaluate the choices
steps.content:
Choice D names Robert Fulton as the city's namesake and provides relevant context about his significance as the steamboat designer, directly answering the goal.

The other three either focus on Fulton Street, skip the connection to Robert Fulton, or discuss the steamboat's history without addressing how Fulton, Missouri, got its name.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
